title: 4 Pcs Kitchen Cooking Tongs Stainless Steel Food Serving Tongs 7'' Buffet Frying Tong for Pasta Salad BBQ Cake Home Party
features: Package: Contains 4 pieces of 7-inch stainless steel serving tongs sufficient quantity to meet the needs of various usage scenarios in the family, satisfying indoor and outdoor use, and easy to carry

Material: The kitchen cooking tongs are made of 304 stainless steel, which can directly contact food, lightweight and easy to handle. Before using for the first time, wash the details of the dinner tongs with dish soap. At the same time, the table tongs are polished so that the edges do not prick your hands

Design: The head of the kitchen tongs adopts a 3-line slit design, the slit design can help you filter out the moisture in the food or the oil in the fried food, and at the same time avoid getting more cooking oil when picking up the food

Wide application: The kitchen tongs are hard and high temperature resistant, easy to operate, and can be used to pick up salad,vegetables, fruits, cakes, bread, fried chicken legs, French fries, donuts, lamb chops, steaks, etc

Gift: The cake tongs set is very suitable as a small gift for relatives and friends, such as parents, friends, wife, grandma, girlfriend, etc. It is a must-have product for friends who like to make desserts and fried foods at home
